questions.question: What is the primary difference between the 2D convolutional layers and the 3D convolutional layers in AlexNet?
questions.hint: Focus on the architecture of AlexNet

questions.question: What is the effect of using a larger receptive field in the 3D convolutional layers of AlexNet?
questions.hint: Consider the benefits and drawbacks of using 3D convolutions

questions.question: How does the AlexNet architecture handle spatial hierarchies in images, and what is the role of the max-pooling layers?
questions.hint: Review the AlexNet architecture and its design choices
